Description: Search your deck for up to 2 Basic Energy cards and attach them to 1 of your Pokémon. Then, shuffle your deck. During this turn, your Pokémon can't attack. (This includes Pokémon that come into play this turn. )

Name: Ortega
Description: Your opponent reveals their hand, and you choose a card you find there and put it on the bottom of their deck. If you put a card on the bottom of your opponent's deck in this way, your opponent may draw a card.

Name: Poppy
Description: Move up to 2 Energy from 1 of your Pokémon to another of your Pokémon.

Name: Ryme
Description: Draw 3 cards. Switch out your opponent's Active Pokémon to the Bench. (Your opponent chooses the new Active Pokémon. )

Name: Eiscue ex
Tera-Effect: As long as this Pokémon is on your Bench, prevent all damage done to this Pokémon by attacks (both yours and your opponent’s).
Effects: Discard an Energy from this Pokémon. During your opponent's next turn, the Defending Pokémon can't attack.
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Charizard ex
Tera-Effect: As long as this Pokémon is on your Bench, prevent all damage done to this Pokémon by attacks (both yours and your opponent’s).
Ability-Effect: When you play this Pokémon from your hand to evolve 1 of your Pokémon during your turn, you may search your deck for up to 3 Basic [R] Energy cards and attach them to your Pokémon in any way you like. Then, shuffle your deck.
Effects: This attack does 30 more damage for each Prize card your opponent has taken.
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Revavroom ex
Ability-Effect: This Pokémon may have up to 4 Pokémon Tools attached to it. If it loses this Ability, discard Pokémon Tools from it until only 1 remains.
Effects: During your opponent's next turn, this Pokémon takes 30 less damage from attacks (after applying Weakness and Resistance).
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Pidgeot ex
Ability-Effect: Once during your turn, you may search your deck for a card and put it into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck. You can't use more than 1 Quick Search Ability each turn.
Effects: You may discard a Stadium in play.
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Geeta
Description: Search your deck for up to 2 Basic Energy cards and attach them to 1 of your Pokémon. Then, shuffle your deck. During this turn, your Pokémon can't attack. (This includes Pokémon that come into play this turn. )

Name: Poppy
Description: Move up to 2 Energy from 1 of your Pokémon to another of your Pokémon.

Name: Charizard ex
Tera-Effect: As long as this Pokémon is on your Bench, prevent all damage done to this Pokémon by attacks (both yours and your opponent’s).
Ability-Effect: When you play this Pokémon from your hand to evolve 1 of your Pokémon during your turn, you may search your deck for up to 3 Basic [R] Energy cards and attach them to your Pokémon in any way you like. Then, shuffle your deck.
Effects: This attack does 30 more damage for each Prize card your opponent has taken.
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Artazon
Description: Once during each player's turn, that player may search their deck for a Basic Pokémon that doesn’t have a Rule Box and put it onto their Bench. Then, that player shuffles their deck. (Pokémon ex, Pokémon V, etc. have Rule Boxes. )
